016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.IoUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.time.*;
025import java.time.temporal.*;
026import java.util.*;
027import java.util.function.*;
028
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
034
035/**
036 * Session for serializing objects to HOCON format.
037 */
038@SuppressWarnings({
039   "resource", "java:S110", "java:S115", "java:S3776", "java:S6541",
040   "rawtypes", "unchecked"
041})
042public class HoconSerializerSession extends WriterSerializerSession implements RecordWritable {
043
044   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
045
046   /**
047    * Builder for HOCON serializer session.
048    */
049   public static class Builder extends WriterSerializerSession.Builder<Builder> {
050
051      private HoconSerializer ctx;
052
053      protected Builder(HoconSerializer ctx) {
054         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
055         this.ctx = ctx;
056      }
057
058      @Override
059      public HoconSerializerSession build() {
060         return new HoconSerializerSession(this);
061      }
062   }
063
064   /**
065    * Creates a session builder.
066    *
067    * @param ctx The serializer context.
068    * @return The builder.
069    */
070   public static Builder create(HoconSerializer ctx) {
071      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
072   }
073
074   private final HoconSerializer ctx;
075
076   protected HoconSerializerSession(Builder builder) {
077      super(builder);
078      ctx = builder.ctx;
079   }
080
081   @Override /* RecordWritable */
082   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
083      return RecordAdapter.writer(this, output);
084   }
085
086   @Override /* RecordWritable */
087   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
088      return false;
089   }
090
091   protected final HoconWriter getHoconWriter(SerializerPipe out) {
092      var output = out.getRawOutput();
093      if (output instanceof HoconWriter w)
094         return w;
095      var w = new HoconWriter(out.getWriter(), isUseWhitespace(), getMaxIndent(), isTrimStrings(),
096         ctx.useNewlineSeparators, ctx.useUnquotedStrings, ctx.useUnquotedKeys, ctx.omitRootBraces,
097         ctx.useMultilineStrings, ctx.useEqualsSign, getUriResolver());
098      out.setWriter(w);
099      return w;
100   }
101
102   @Override
103   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe out, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
104      if (o == null)
105         return;
106      var aType = getClassMetaForObject(o);
107      var eType = getExpectedRootType(o);
108      var hw = getHoconWriter(out).i(getInitialDepth());
109      ClassMeta<?> sType = aType;
110      var swap = aType.getSwap(this);
111      if (nn(swap)) {
112         o = swap(swap, o);
113         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
114         if (sType.isObject())
115            sType = getClassMetaForObject(o);
116      }
117      if (sType.isBean() || sType.isMap()) {
118         var omitRoot = ctx.omitRootBraces;
119         if (sType.isBean())
120            serializeBeanMap(hw, toBeanMap(o), getBeanTypeName(this, eType, sType, null), omitRoot);
121         else
122            serializeMap(hw, (Map) o, eType, omitRoot);
123      } else {
124         serializeAnything(hw, o, eType, "root", null);
125      }
126   }
127
128   private void serializeBeanMap(HoconWriter out, BeanMap<?> m, String typeName, boolean omitRootBraces) throws SerializeException {
129      var i = indent;
130      if (!omitRootBraces) {
131         out.objectStart(i);
132         indent++;
133      }
134      var first = Flag.create();
135      Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
136
137      if (nn(typeName)) {
138         var pm = m.getMeta().getTypeProperty();
139         writeKeyPrefix(out, pm.getName(), i, first);
140         out.equalsSign();
141         serializeString(out, typeName);
142         first.set();
143      }
144
145      m.forEachValue(checkNull, (pMeta, key, value, thrown) -> {
146         var cMeta = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
147         if (nn(thrown))
148            onBeanGetterException(pMeta, thrown);
149         if (canIgnoreValue(pMeta, key, value))
150            return;
151         var isObject = cMeta.isBean() || cMeta.isMap();
152         writeKeyPrefix(out, key, i, first);
153         if (isObject) {
154            out.append(" ");
155            if (value instanceof BeanMap bm)
156               serializeBeanMap(out, bm, getBeanTypeName(this, cMeta, cMeta, pMeta), false);
157            else if (cMeta.isBean())
158               serializeBeanMap(out, toBeanMap(value), getBeanTypeName(this, cMeta, cMeta, pMeta), false);
159            else
160               serializeMap(out, (Map) value, cMeta, false);
161         } else {
162            out.equalsSign();
163            serializeAnything(out, value, cMeta, key, pMeta);
164         }
165         first.set();
166      });
167
168      if (!omitRootBraces) {
169         indent--;
170         out.objectEnd(indent);
171      }
172   }
173
174   private void writeKeyPrefix(HoconWriter out, Object key, int depth, Flag first) throws SerializeException {
175      if (first.isSet())
176         out.separator(depth);
177      else
178         out.cr(depth);
179      var keyStr = toString(key);
180      out.key(keyStr);
181   }
182
183   private void serializeMap(HoconWriter out, Map m, ClassMeta<?> type, boolean omitRootBraces) throws SerializeException {
184      var i = indent;
185      if (!omitRootBraces) {
186         out.objectStart(i);
187         indent++;
188      }
189      var keyType = type.getKeyType();
190      var valueType = type.getValueType();
191      var first = Flag.create();
192
193      forEachEntry(m, x -> {
194         var value = x.getValue();
195         var key = generalize(x.getKey(), keyType);
196         var isObject = value != null && (value instanceof Map || value instanceof BeanMap);
197         writeKeyPrefix(out, key, i, first);
198         if (isObject) {
199            out.append(" ");
200            if (value instanceof BeanMap bm)
201               serializeBeanMap(out, bm, getBeanTypeName(this, valueType, getClassMetaForObject(value), null), false);
202            else
203               serializeMap(out, (Map) value, object(), false);
204         } else {
205            out.equalsSign();
206            serializeAnything(out, value, valueType, key == null ? null : toString(key), null);
207         }
208         first.set();
209      });
210
211      if (!omitRootBraces) {
212         indent--;
213         out.objectEnd(indent);
214      }
215   }
216
217   private void serializeCollection(HoconWriter out, Collection c, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
218      var eType = type.getElementType();
219      out.arrayStart();
220      indent++;
221      var first = Flag.create();
222      forEachEntry(c, x -> {
223         if (first.isSet())
224            out.separator(indent);
225         else
226            out.cr(indent);
227         serializeAnything(out, x, eType, "<iterator>", null);
228         first.set();
229      });
230      indent--;
231      out.arrayEnd();
232   }
233
234   private void serializeString(HoconWriter out, String s) throws SerializeException {
235      if (s == null) {
236         out.w("null");
237         return;
238      }
239      if (ctx.useMultilineStrings && s.contains("\n"))
240         out.tripleQuotedString(s);
241      else if (out.isSimpleValue(s))
242         out.unquotedString(s);
243      else
244         out.quotedString(s);
245   }
246
247   protected HoconWriter serializeAnything(HoconWriter hw, Object o, ClassMeta<?> eType, String attrName, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws SerializeException {
248      if (o == null) {
249         hw.w("null");
250         return hw;
251      }
252      if (eType == null)
253         eType = object();
254
255      var aType = push2(attrName, o, eType);
256      var isRecursion = aType == null;
257
258      if (aType == null) {
259         o = null;
260         aType = object();
261      }
262
263      if (isOptional(aType)) {
264         o = getOptionalValue(o);
265         eType = getOptionalType(eType);
266         aType = getClassMetaForObject(o, object());
267      }
268
269      var sType = aType;
270      var swap = aType.getSwap(this);
271      if (nn(swap)) {
272         o = swap(swap, o);
273         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
274         if (sType.isObject())
275            sType = getClassMetaForObject(o);
276      }
277
278      if (o == null || (sType.isChar() && ((Character) o).charValue() == 0)) {
279         hw.w("null");
280      } else if (o instanceof byte[] bytes) {
281         // byte[] gate: encode as Base64 before isArray would otherwise route it as a generic array.
282         serializeString(hw, Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(bytes));
283      } else if (sType.isBean()) {
284         serializeBeanMap(hw, toBeanMap(o), getBeanTypeName(this, eType, aType, pMeta), false);
285      } else if (sType.isMap()) {
286         if (o instanceof BeanMap o2)
287            serializeBeanMap(hw, o2, getBeanTypeName(this, eType, aType, pMeta), false);
288         else
289            serializeMap(hw, (Map) o, eType, false);
290      } else if (sType.isCollection()) {
291         serializeCollection(hw, (Collection) o, eType);
292      } else if (sType.isArray()) {
293         serializeCollection(hw, toList(sType.inner(), o), eType);
294      } else if (sType.isNumber() || sType.isBoolean()) {
295         hw.append(o);
296      } else if (sType.isUri() || (nn(pMeta) && pMeta.isUri())) {
297         serializeString(hw, getUriResolver().resolve(o));
298      } else if (sType.isDate()) {
299         serializeString(hw, serializeDate((Date)o, sType));
300      } else if (sType.isCalendar()) {
301         serializeString(hw, serializeCalendar(o, sType));
302      } else if (sType.isTemporal()) {
303         serializeString(hw, serializeTemporal((TemporalAccessor)o, sType));
304      } else if (sType.isDuration()) {
305         var value = serializeDuration((Duration)o);
306         if (getDurationFormat().isNumeric())
307            hw.append(value);
308         else
309            serializeString(hw, value);
310      } else if (sType.isPeriod()) {
311         serializeString(hw, serializePeriod((Period)o));
312      } else if (sType.isStreamable()) {
313         serializeStreamable(hw, o, sType, eType);
314      } else if (sType.isReader()) {
315         pipe((Reader) o, hw, SerializerSession::handleThrown);
316      } else if (sType.isInputStream()) {
317         pipe((InputStream) o, hw, SerializerSession::handleThrown);
318      } else {
319         serializeString(hw, toString(o));
320      }
321
322      if (!isRecursion)
323         pop();
324      return hw;
325   }
326
327   private void serializeStreamable(HoconWriter out, Object o, ClassMeta<?> sType, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
328      var eType = type.getElementType();
329      out.arrayStart();
330      indent++;
331      var first = Flag.create();
332      forEachStreamableEntry(o, sType, x -> {
333         if (first.isSet())
334            out.separator(indent);
335         else
336            out.cr(indent);
337         serializeAnything(out, x, eType, "<iterator>", null);
338         first.set();
339      });
340      indent--;
341      out.arrayEnd();
342   }
343}
